attacking_style: Opportunistic late attacker from established breakaways, striking inside final 1km when peloton positioning compresses. Prefers exploiting tactical chaos over pure power moves.
team_tactics: Insufficient data - observed as lone wolf in breakaway rather than team-supported effort. No visible team setup patterns detected.
terrain_preference: Courses with multiple KOM contests that drain breakaway rivals but allow riders with superior endurance to survive for final sprint. Mixed terrain stages favor his profile.
vulnerability: Unknown in pure climbing scenarios or head-to-head sprint finishes. Likely vulnerable when peloton has clean run to chase down breaks without positioning complications.
key_patterns: Conserves energy in early breakaways despite KOM contests, striking only in finale (2 observations)
Exploits peloton positioning chaos and compression rather than attacking on open road (2 observations)
Shows unexpected endurance sustaining multi-hour breakaway efforts through mountainous terrain (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: Single race data from 2017 shows strong breakaway capacity and tactical awareness, but no trajectory visible
